game_info.title: Doodle Devil™
game_info.concept: **Doodle Devil™:** Players combine existing elements to discover new, "evil" elements in a puzzle-driven creation game, starting with four basic elements like Fire, Earth, Wind, and Air displayed in a left-hand panel. The core mechanic involves dragging two elements from the panel onto a central creation area to attempt a combination (e.g., Human + Sin = Sinner), with successful discoveries adding the new element to the player's available inventory. Progression is measured by the total number of elements discovered, with hundreds of unique combinations available across various categories like demons, monsters, and sins, and difficulty scaling as combinations become less intuitive and require more abstract thought. The primary goal is to discover all possible elements, with side modes like "Demon Battle Card Game" offering alternative gameplay loops.
game_info.description: Discover the dark side of alchemy in Doodle Devil™! Start with four basic elements and combine them to unlock sinister creations including demons, monsters, sins, and forbidden knowledge. Drag elements onto the combination slots to experiment - successful discoveries add new elements to your collection. Your goal is to discover all possible evil elements through clever combinations and abstract thinking. Progress through increasingly challenging puzzles as you expand your demonic inventory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate through element panels and selection
Space: Confirm element selection / Attempt combination
Z: Clear current combination slots
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic element selection and combination mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate elements, select them into combination slots, and successfully create new elements through valid combinations.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through available elements using arrow keys, select two basic elements (Fire + Earth = Lava), confirm the combination with Space, and verify the new element appears in the inventory. Repeat with multiple simple combinations.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully creates at least 5 new elements through valid combinations. Element count increases appropriately, and newly discovered elements become available for further combinations. No errors or crashes occur during the combination process.

TEST_1.expected: The test successfully creates at least 5 new elements through valid combinations. Element count increases appropriately, and newly discovered elements become available for further combinations. No errors or crashes occur during the combination process.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal path to win condition by discovering all available elements. Implements an intelligent strategy that systematically tries all possible combinations to unlock the complete element tree.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use a breadth-first search approach to systematically combine all available elements. Start with basic elements, create first-tier combinations, then use new elements for second-tier combinations, continuing until all discoverable elements are found.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state when all elements are discovered (target: 50+ elements). The test completes within a reasonable time frame and demonstrates that the win condition is achievable through systematic exploration.

TEST_2.expected: The game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state when all elements are discovered (target: 50+ elements). The test completes within a reasonable time frame and demonstrates that the win condition is achievable through systematic exploration.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests edge cases and error handling including invalid combinations, attempting to combine an element with itself, and UI navigation boundaries.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Attempt invalid combinations (elements that don't create anything new), try combining identical elements, navigate beyond panel boundaries, and verify the game handles these gracefully without crashes.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Invalid combinations show appropriate feedback without creating elements. The game remains stable with no crashes. Navigation wraps correctly at boundaries. Element count only increases for valid, new discoveries.
TEST_3.description: Tests edge cases and error handling including invalid combinations, attempting to combine an element with itself, and UI navigation boundaries.

TEST_3.expected: Invalid combinations show appropriate feedback without creating elements. The game remains stable with no crashes. Navigation wraps correctly at boundaries. Element count only increases for valid, new discoveries.
